info.title: Lumify SDK contract
info.description: Filtered slice of the live Lumify OpenAPI schema (/v1 + /api/agent only). Generated by scripts/export_openapi_sdk.py — do not edit by hand.

post.summary: Estimate the credit cost of a planned call (or batch of calls)

200.description: Min/max credit range per requested call, plus totals. Costs are data-dependent (e.g. odds/intelligence/splits not yet ingested are free), so this is a range, not an exact number — the real call's X-Credits-Used response header reports what it actually billed. Estimating is always free (X-Credits-Used: 0).

schema.title: Response Estimate Cost V1 Estimate Post

200.description: Supported tool names, grouped by how their cost varies.

schema.title: Response List Estimate Tools V1 Estimate Tools Get

schema.description: Sort order: 'time' (chronological, default) or 'status' (Live → Delayed/Upcoming → Final → Cancelled/Postponed). Cursor pagination (after_id) is not supported with sort=status.
schema.title: Sort

parameters.description: Sort order: 'time' (chronological, default) or 'status' (Live → Delayed/Upcoming → Final → Cancelled/Postponed). Cursor pagination (after_id) is not supported with sort=status.

200.description: Paginated event list, newest first within the requested window

schema.title: Response List Events V1 Events Get

post.summary: Get multiple events in one call
post.description:
Fetch multiple events by id in a single round-trip — for agents that
already have a list of ids (e.g. from GET /v1/events) and want full detail
for each without issuing one GET per event.

Body: {"event_ids": [1, 2, 3], "include_odds": bool, "include_intelligence": bool, "bookmaker": str}
Max 25 ids per call. Duplicate ids are billed once. Credits are the sum of
each event's normal GET /v1/events/{id} cost — billing fairness applies
per event (unavailable odds/intelligence are free; ids that don't exist
cost nothing and are returned under "not_found").

200.description: Requested events (each shaped like GET /v1/events/{id}) plus any ids not found

schema.title: Response Batch Get Events V1 Events Batch Post

parameters.name: include_odds

schema.description: Inline current odds (all bookmakers) into the response under the 'odds' key. Costs +1 credit (total 2 for this call).
schema.title: Include Odds

parameters.description: Inline current odds (all bookmakers) into the response under the 'odds' key. Costs +1 credit (total 2 for this call).

parameters.name: include_intelligence

schema.description: Inline bet intelligence (signals, bets, narratives) into the response under the 'intelligence' key. Costs +1 credit (total 2 for this call).
schema.title: Include Intelligence

parameters.description: Inline bet intelligence (signals, bets, narratives) into the response under the 'intelligence' key. Costs +1 credit (total 2 for this call).

parameters.name: bookmaker

schema.description: Bookmaker to use for market prices in intelligence.bets[].market when include_intelligence=true. Valid values: pinnacle, fanduel, draftkings.
schema.title: Bookmaker

parameters.description: Bookmaker to use for market prices in intelligence.bets[].market when include_intelligence=true. Valid values: pinnacle, fanduel, draftkings.

200.description: Full event with participants, venue, and schedule metadata

schema.title: Response Get Event V1 Events  Event Id  Get

get.summary: Get bet intelligence for an event

parameters.name: bookmaker

schema.description: Bookmaker to use for market.price and market.line in the response. Overrides the system default (pinnacle). Valid values: pinnacle, fanduel, draftkings.
schema.title: Bookmaker

parameters.description: Bookmaker to use for market.price and market.line in the response. Overrides the system default (pinnacle). Valid values: pinnacle, fanduel, draftkings.

200.description: Confidence scores, signal breakdowns, narratives, and market odds for all bet tokens. MLB tokens: ML_P1 (home), ML_P2 (away), SPREAD_P1, SPREAD_P2, OVER, UNDER. Tennis tokens: ML_P1, ML_P2, SPREAD_P1, SPREAD_P2, OVER, UNDER. Soccer tokens: ML_HOME, ML_AWAY, ML_DRAW, SPREAD_HOME, SPREAD_AWAY, OVER, UNDER. Also includes event-level analyst take and match overview from the lumify_match_intelligence table. If no intelligence has been computed for this event yet, returns 200 with available=false and is NOT charged (X-Credits-Used: 0).

schema.title: Response Get Event Intelligence V1 Events  Event Id  Intelligence Get

get.summary: Get current betting odds for an event

parameters.name: bookmaker

schema.description: Bookmaker filter. Default: pinnacle. Use 'all' or a comma-separated list (e.g. 'fanduel,draftkings') for multiple books. Single book = 1 credit; multiple or 'all' = 2 credits.
schema.title: Bookmaker

parameters.description: Bookmaker filter. Default: pinnacle. Use 'all' or a comma-separated list (e.g. 'fanduel,draftkings') for multiple books. Single book = 1 credit; multiple or 'all' = 2 credits.

200.description: Current moneyline, spread, and total lines for the requested bookmaker(s). Default is Pinnacle only (1 credit). Use bookmaker=all or a comma-separated list (e.g. bookmaker=fanduel,draftkings) to fetch multiple books (2 credits). Markets are grouped by type (h2h → moneyline, spreads → spread, totals → totals). If no odds have been ingested for this event yet, returns 200 with available=false and is NOT charged (X-Credits-Used: 0).

schema.title: Response Get Event Odds V1 Events  Event Id  Odds Get

get.summary: Get line movement history for an event

parameters.name: bookmaker

schema.description: Bookmaker filter. Default: pinnacle. Use 'all' or a comma-separated list for multiple books. Single book = 1 credit; multiple or 'all' = 2 credits.
schema.title: Bookmaker

parameters.description: Bookmaker filter. Default: pinnacle. Use 'all' or a comma-separated list for multiple books. Single book = 1 credit; multiple or 'all' = 2 credits.

200.description: All recorded line movements (price or point changes) for the event, ordered newest-first. Useful for detecting sharp line movement. If no movement has been recorded for this event yet, returns 200 with an empty movements list and is NOT charged (X-Credits-Used: 0).

schema.title: Response Get Event Odds History V1 Events  Event Id  Odds History Get

200.description: Lightweight score snapshot: status, period, clock, and per-participant scores. Cache TTL is 30 s for in-progress events, 5 min otherwise.

schema.title: Response Get Event Score V1 Events  Event Id  Score Get

get.summary: Get public betting splits for an event

200.description: Public bets% and handle% per side, per market, per bookmaker. Also includes a consensus (average across books) for quick use. If no splits have been ingested for this event yet, returns 200 with available=false and is NOT charged (X-Credits-Used: 0).

schema.title: Response Get Event Splits V1 Events  Event Id  Splits Get

200.description: text/event-stream of score updates; emits on change only.

post.description:
Map a natural-language query to the same filters GET /v1/events accepts,
then run that exact list query — results are identical to, and as fresh
as, calling /v1/events directly. This is a small rule-based mapper, not an
LLM call — see the module-level `_parse_nl_query` docstring for exactly
what it recognizes.

Body: {"query": "live nfl games today", "limit": 25}
An explicit top-level "limit" overrides one parsed from the text. Costs 1
credit, same as GET /v1/events — interpreting the query text is free.

200.description: Events matching the parsed query, the interpreted filters, and their REST equivalent

schema.title: Response Query Events V1 Query Post

post.summary: Issue an instant, unauthenticated trial API key
post.description: Issues a throwaway API key with no signup or email verification — 100 lifetime credits, 14-day expiry, one per network per 7 days. Requires a valid Cloudflare Turnstile token. Intended for the 'Get instant trial key' button on /docs/ai, not for building a persistent integration — use /register for that.

get.summary: List delivery history for a webhook subscription

parameters.name: after_id

schema.description: Cursor: return deliveries with id < after_id (list is newest-first)
schema.title: After Id

parameters.description: Cursor: return deliveries with id < after_id (list is newest-first)

200.description: Paginated delivery attempts, newest first. Retries appear as their own rows, linked via parent_delivery_id.

key.title: Key
key.description: Full API key — returned once on create.

event_ids.title: Event Ids
event_ids.description: Event ids to fetch (max 25). Duplicates are billed once.

include_odds.title: Include Odds
include_odds.description: Inline current odds on each event (+1 credit per event when available).

include_intelligence.title: Include Intelligence
include_intelligence.description: Inline bet intelligence on each event (+1 credit per event when available).

bookmaker.title: Bookmaker
bookmaker.description: Bookmaker for inlined odds; defaults to pinnacle, 'all' for every book.

not_found.title: Not Found
not_found.description: Requested event_ids that don't exist. Never billed.

tool.title: Tool
tool.description: The MCP tool / SDK call to estimate, e.g. 'get_event', 'batch_get_events', 'get_odds'. See GET /v1/estimate/tools for the full supported list.

arguments.title: Arguments
arguments.description: Same arguments you'd pass to that tool/endpoint, e.g. {"event_id": 123, "include_odds": true}.

calls.title: Calls
calls.description: One or more planned calls to estimate in a single round-trip.

min_credits.title: Min Credits
min_credits.description: Cheapest realistic outcome (e.g. requested data not yet available).

max_credits.title: Max Credits
max_credits.description: Priciest realistic outcome (e.g. all requested data is available).

note.title: Note
note.description: Why the cost varies, when it does.

query.title: Query
query.description: Free text, e.g. 'live nfl games today' or 'college basketball this week'.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Overrides any limit parsed from the query text. Max 100.

interpreted.description: The GET /v1/events filters parsed from the query text.

unrecognized_terms.title: Unrecognized Terms
unrecognized_terms.description: Query words that didn't map to a known filter.

equivalent_request.title: Equivalent Request
equivalent_request.description: The literal GET /v1/events request this query was translated to.

cf-turnstile-response.title: Cf-Turnstile-Response
cf-turnstile-response.description: Cloudflare Turnstile response token from the widget on /docs/ai.

signing_secret.title: Signing Secret
signing_secret.description: Returned only on create — store it to verify Lumify-Signature.

signing_secret.title: Signing Secret
signing_secret.description: Returned only on create — store it to verify Lumify-Signature.

ApiKeyBearer.description: Lumify API key passed as `Authorization: Bearer lmfy-...`.
